scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @scaffold-learning/domain && npm run build:client && npm run build --workspace functions && node scripts/prepare-functions-deploy.mjs
scripts.build:functions-deploy: npm run build --workspace functions && node scripts/prepare-functions-deploy.mjs
scripts.build:e2e: VITE_USE_EMULATORS=true VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY=demo-api-key VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=demo-scaffold-learning.firebaseapp.com VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-scaffold-learning VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID=demo-app-id VITE_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=demo-scaffold-learning.firebasestorage.app npm run build
scripts.emulators:start: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --project demo-scaffold-learning --only auth,firestore,functions,hosting,storage
scripts.emulators:exec: npm run build:functions-deploy && firebase emulators:exec --project demo-scaffold-learning --only auth,firestore,functions
scripts.firebase:validate: firebase emulators:exec --project demo-scaffold-learning --only firestore "npm run test:firestore:rules"
scripts.check: npm run functions:clean && npm run domain:clean && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run domain:check && npm run build --workspace @scaffold-learning/domain && npm run functions:check && npm run test:run && npm run build && npm run check:client && npm run check:provider
